who: HR finance teams using QuickBooks processing 5–15 travel expense reports/month
offer: For HR finance teams using QuickBooks processing 5–15 travel expense reports/month, manual processing causes delays in approvals. We simplify the extraction and summarization of travel expenses instead of manual entry and spreadsheet tracking.
problem: Manual processing of travel expenses leads to delays in approvals and potential errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR finance teams
Indie Hackers discussions on expense processing
DM outreach to HR finance teams with demo video
Community forums where finance teams share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry and report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
